query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.productLane,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.tier,
  p.projectValue,
  LEFT(p.description, 300) as description,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' | ', c.roleBucket, ' @ ', c.company) END SEPARATOR '~~') as contactList
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '"Portable Air"')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.productLane, p.lifecycleStatus, p.tier, p.projectValue, p.description
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.tier ASC, p.id ASC
LIMIT 20;

  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' | ', c.roleBucket, ' @ ', c.company) END SEPARATOR '~~') as contactList
